title: Pacific Biosciences (PACB): Deep Dive Into Q3 2023 Revenue Surge And Market Dynamics
text: PacBio registered Q3 2023 revenues of $55.7 million, up 72.4% year over year, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 15.3%. PacBio delivered adjusted loss per share of 27 cents in Q3 2023, narrower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 30 cents. Instrument revenues were $34.7 million, up 204.4% year-over-year, primarily from continued momentum of Revio systems. Consumables revenues for Q3 2023 were $16.9 million, up 4.9% from prior-year quarter, against a projection of $13.6 million. Service and other revenues totaled $4.1 million, down 14% year-over-year, lagging the projection of $4.4 million. PacBio shipped 52 Revio sequencing systems in Q3, bringing the company's installed base to 129 Revio systems as of September 30, 2023. In its latest earnings call, PacBio revised its 2023 revenue forecast upward, estimating between $195 million and $200 million, marking a 52% to 56% increase from 2022.
